properties.Observation: The total length of the canal 6.0km, out of which 3250m concreted. Only the necessary places of the unconcreted earthen canal should be concreted. The earthen canal should be concreted from place to place. Command area 250.0 acres
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Construction of 650m long 600mm x 450mm (width x height) Rectangular Con. canal. Wall thickness 125mm in where necessary
